title: Smart Campaign Manager
description: AI outreach campaign platform to generate, personalize, and analyze bulk emails. Tracks provider metrics across OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini LLMs with cost and reply analytics.

title: FutureMap
description: AI-Powered Career Guidance Platform helping students discover career paths through assessments, resume scoring, and visual learning roadmaps.

title: IoT Virtual Doctor
description: An intelligent healthcare assistant that remotely monitors patient vitals using IoT sensors and sends real-time health data to doctors for early diagnosis.

title: Employee Management System
description: A backend service built with Spring Boot to manage corporate employee records, registrations, course enrollments, and performance with RESTful APIs.

title: Uber Ride Data Analysis
description: Performed exploratory data analysis on Uber rides in Pune to uncover ride frequency, peak hours, and location trends using statistical plotting libraries.

title: NavEye
description: A wearable navigation aid for visually impaired individuals. Incorporates ultrasonic sensors and speech synthesis models for distance hazard alerts.
